rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: SecretsDump File Modification

rules.rule_text:
title: SecretsDump File Modification
id: 88de04f6-c443-40ec-a592-72c31a55810b
status: experimental
description: "Impacket\u2019s SecretsDump utility consistently involves the Windows\
  \ Service Host \n(svchost.exe) writing randomly named .tmp files to the System32\
  \ directory. The \nfollowing pseudo-detector should offer defenders a reliable method\
  \ of detecting \nImpacket's SecretsDump utility. Part of the RedCanary 2024 Threat\
  \ Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/os-credential-dumping/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.credential_access
- attack.t1003
logsource:
  category: image_load
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \svchost.exe
    ImageLoaded|endswith: \regsvc.dll
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
